report.title: 90-Day Execution Pack: ChatOps, Predictive Modeling, and Advanced Operations
report.abstract: This final report specifies the advanced operations for the 90-day AI governance rollout. It details ChatOps-based approval workflows with federated identity, Slack/Teams notification templates, predictive compliance risk modeling, and the 'Remediation Suggestion Engine' for CAIO/CRO operational scaling.
